name: compliance auto-refresh: failed refresh leaves last-fetch marker unchanged (subsequent runs retry; status remains stale)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && echo "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/x.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/auto-refresh-daily.sh" --framework-id x --upstream-stub "$PWD/fail.sh" --now 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z 2>/dev/null && grep "2025-01-01" .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/x.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
